name: MiLady 3D3N
description: Experience the Whitsundays in style aboard MiLady, a luxurious 54ft yacht offering intimate small-group adventures. This premium tour is perfect for those seeking a blend of relaxation and adventure, with only six guests onboard ensuring a personalized experience. Enjoy sailing through crystal-clear waters, exploring vibrant coral reefs, and indulging in gourmet meals prepared by your personal chef. Ideal for couples, families, and small groups looking for a unique and memorable escape in paradise.
includes:
Sail for 3 days and 3 nights
Intimate experience with only 6 guests
Spacious cabins with ensuites
Fully air-conditioned 54ft yacht
Snorkel the Great Barrier Reef Marine Park
All snorkelling equipment provided
Gourmet meals freshly prepared on board
Electric winches for fast cruise sailing
Licensed vessel (no BYO)
Shark shield antenna for passenger safety
highlights:
Explore the best parts of the Whitsundays
Comforts of home on board MiLady
Tailor your charter with premium drinks packages
Newest commercial vessel in the area
Authentic sailing experience
Small group sailing tour

name: MiLady 2D2N
description: Experience the Whitsundays in ultimate comfort aboard MiLady, a modern 54ft yacht designed for small group adventures. With only six passengers per tour, this intimate journey allows you to escape the crowds and enjoy a personalized sailing experience. Whether you're an adventure seeker or looking for relaxation, MiLady offers authentic sailing with opportunities to help set sails or steer, explore breathtaking coral reefs, and unwind on one of the world's most beautiful beaches. Ideal for couples, families, and small groups, this tour combines luxury with the thrill of discovery, complete with gourmet meals and the chance to listen to whalesong during the season.
departure_times: Departs 3:30pm Mon & Wed, Returns 12:00pm Wed & Fri
includes:
Spacious cabins with ensuites
Fully air-conditioned 54ft yacht
Snorkel the Great Barrier Reef Marine Park
All snorkelling equipment and stingersuits provided
Gourmet meals freshly prepared on board
Listen to the sounds of whalesong from a hydrophone during Whale Season
Electric winches for fast cruise sailing
Pickups from the islands: Hamilton Island/Daydream Island and Long Island
Stand-up paddle boards
Licensed vessel (no BYO)
highlights:
Relaxing 2 days and 2 nights sailing experience
Small group sailing with only 6 passengers
Authentic sailing experience with opportunities to assist
Explore the Great Barrier Reef Marine Park
Gourmet meals prepared onboard
Listen to whalesong during Whale Season
Private cabins with ensuite bathrooms
Newest commercial vessel in the area
Enjoy afternoon sun-downer nibbles and bubbles
